articles.title: Man accused of assaulting two workers, stealing car during 3 separate trips to Dedham gas station
articles.description:
Police allege the suspect returned to the same gas station multiple times on Saturday, committing a separate crime on each visit.

The post Man accused of assaulting two workers, stealing car during 3 separate trips to Dedham gas station appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Suspect assaulted two gas station workers during three separate visits on Saturday.
The man stole a car and committed multiple crimes at the Dedham gas station.
Local residents are concerned about safety at gas stations following these incidents.

articles.title: Mass. business confidence dips back into pessimism
articles.description:
Surging energy prices and the war in Iran are dragging down employers’ outlooks.

The post Mass. business confidence dips back into pessimism appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts business confidence fell, reflecting pessimism among employers due to rising energy prices.
The ongoing war in Iran contributes to uncertainty, affecting local economic outlooks.
Local businesses may face challenges in hiring and investment decisions as confidence declines.
